assertions.title: Send message accepts and emits user_message

steps.expected: HTTP 200/202 and SSE user_message with status accepted
steps.observed: HTTP 202 with {status: accepted}; SSE user_message event with status accepted and message content

steps.action: Send message and capture SSE stream
steps.expected: text_delta events followed by text_complete with full text
steps.observed: SSE text_delta then text_complete: 'Simulated response for: Second message from msg-group-1'

steps.action: Send message and capture SSE stream
steps.expected: tool_start followed by tool_result with matching toolUseId
steps.observed: SSE tool_start then tool_result for toolUseId 'tool-3'

assertions.title: Interrupt active processing

steps.expected: HTTP 200 and SSE interrupted event when processing
steps.observed: HTTP 200; no interrupted event observed because mock sessions start with isProcessing=false

evidence.sse: No interrupted event emitted in mock; see test-server note for isProcessing=false

assertions.issues: Mock session manager never sets isProcessing=true, so cancelProcessing returns false and interrupted event cannot be emitted. Endpoint returns 200 as expected.

assertions.title: Kill background shell

steps.expected: HTTP 200 and SSE shell_killed for active shell
steps.observed: HTTP 404 shell_not_found for unknown shell (no active shells in mock session)

assertions.issues: Mock sessions have empty activeShellIds; killShell returns 404 for unknown shells, so shell_killed event cannot be verified.

steps.action: Send message and capture SSE stream

assertions.title: Error and typed_error events

steps.action: Attempt to trigger error/typed_error events via mock sendMessage
steps.observed: Mock sendMessage does not emit error events; verified serialization coverage in tests

evidence.network: N/A (no error event produced by mock)

assertions.issues: Mock server does not generate error/typed_error events during sendMessage; only serialization verified via unit tests.

assertions.title: Permission request event

steps.observed: Mock server does not emit permission_request; serialization verified in unit tests

assertions.issues: Mock server does not generate permission_request events; only serialization verified via unit tests.

steps.observed: HTTP 400 {code: invalid_request, message: 'Message text is required'}

steps.action: POST with invalid options (optimisticMessageId empty string)

assertions.title: Core streaming events have correct DTO shape

steps.action: Send message and observe SSE stream
steps.expected: text_delta, text_complete, tool_start, tool_result, complete, user_message payloads match DTO shapes
steps.observed: SSE payloads include required fields and types for session-4

assertions.title: Session lifecycle events have correct DTO shape

steps.expected: SSE session_created and session_deleted events with correct fields
steps.observed: SSE session_created and session_deleted for session-5

assertions.title: Interactive events have correct DTO shape

steps.action: Send message and review SSE for user_message
steps.expected: user_message event contains nested message DTO
steps.observed: SSE user_message payload includes message object with required fields

steps.action: Review serializer tests for permission_request and credential_request
steps.observed: Unit tests validate request object shapes

blockers.description: Mock session manager never sets isProcessing=true, so interrupted SSE event cannot be emitted for VAL-MSG-004.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified interrupt endpoint returns 200; no way to set isProcessing via API in mock.

blockers.description: Mock sessions have no activeShellIds, so shell_killed SSE event cannot be produced for VAL-MSG-006.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted kill on shell-1; received 404 shell_not_found.

blockers.description: Mock sendMessage does not emit error/typed_error or permission_request events for VAL-MSG-008/009.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified serialization coverage in session-serializers unit tests.

summary: Tested 13 messaging assertions: 9 passed, 4 blocked due to mock limitations (interrupt active processing, shell_killed, error/typed_error, permission_request).
